## 📜 License Notice

> ⚠️ **Important:** kslearn is **proprietary software** owned by **KashSight Platform** and is provided for **personal learning use only**.

| Policy | Status |
|:---|:---:|
| Code contributions | ❌ Not accepted |
| Pull requests | ❌ Not accepted |
| Bug reports | ✅ Welcome |
| Feature suggestions | ✅ Welcome |
| Content requests | ✅ Welcome |

---

## 🐛 Report a Bug

> Found something that isn't working right? Let us know!

### What to Include

| Item | Description | Example |
|:---|:---|:---|
| **Platform** | Your operating system | Termux, Linux, macOS, Windows |
| **Python version** | `python --version` | Python 3.11.5 |
| **Steps to reproduce** | Numbered list of actions | 1. Launch kslearn 2. Press `1` 3. Error appears |
| **Error output** | Screenshot or text | Copy-paste the error message |

### How to Submit

1. Use our [Bug Report Template](ISSUE_TEMPLATE/bug_report.md)
2. Fill in all required fields
3. Submit via GitHub Issues

> 💡 **Tip:** The more detail you provide, the faster we can fix it!

---

## 💡 Suggest a Feature

> Have an idea for a new feature or improvement?

### What to Include

| Item | Description |
|:---|:---|
| **Feature description** | What you'd like to see |
| **Use case** | Why it would be useful |
| **Examples** | References or mockups (optional) |

### How to Submit

1. Use our [Feature Request Template](ISSUE_TEMPLATE/feature_request.md)
2. Describe your idea clearly
3. Submit via GitHub Issues
